reason: Backend architecture: Plugin System (loader, adapters, lifecycle) and AgentBackend abstraction that the marketplace builds on
File placement for new marketplace/ directory alongside plugins/ and workflow/
TypeScript quality standards, const-object enums, TypeBox schemas, build verification
Error handling for package download, install failures, and registry communication
Storage patterns for installed agent packages, ratings cache, and update tracking
Frontend component patterns, design tokens, styling conventions for marketplace UI pages
Frontend file placement for new marketplace settings page
IPC-driven state patterns for marketplace data (listings, search results, install status)
Type organization for marketplace types (AgentPackage, MarketplaceListing, Review)
Marketplace spans multiple layers: registry API, download, plugin install, UI state, IPC bridge
Requirements: agent package format (R1), browse/search (R2), install/update (R3), publish (R4), ratings (R5)
